commit.author: FlexNetOS <flexnetos@de-flex.net>

lines.content: - **Discarded from migration:** `ruvector` + `weftos` ‚ÄĒ user will pull fresh clones and set up correctly separately; excluded from `.meta.yaml`. owned 5‚Üí4, forked 9‚Üí8.
- **Phase 0 edits committed** to root meta repo (`220be93`).

- **Phase 1 executed (map):** branch `refactor/slim-to-meta` + `MIGRATION.md` (`4fefb0e`); `main` intact. Discovered `.gitmodules`/MANIFEST drift (actual 17 submodules ‚Č† ~28 manifest). Removals deferred to Phase 2 (extract-then-remove) due to live secrets.
- **Next:** Phase 2 needs USER to create the `flexnetos_*` repos + 4 missing forks. Confirm the 5 open destination questions in MIGRATION.md + the manifest-vs-reality migration scope.

- **Strategy pivot (user):** "ground the repos first, move content later." Don't fuss over precise content placement now ‚ÄĒ register the curated repo list as meta peers so the workspace is grounded; relocate content afterward. Drop the `.omc` cache. Branch-as-content-silo idea (`.claude` branch on `claude-code`) rejected as an anti-pattern; user will create dedicated hubs (`agent_hub`, `skills_hub`, ‚Ä¶) instead.
- **Forks created** by user under FlexNetOS: archon‚ÜíArchon, everything-claude-code‚Üí**ECC**, oh-my-claudecode, oh-my-pi. `.omc`‚Üí`oh-my-claudecode`.

- **Reconnaissance:** all 21 listed repos exist. 5 are empty (await content): flexnetos_{secrets,runner,wiki,brain,github_app}. The other 16+ are populated pre-existing projects ‚Üí peers only. Resolves the manifest-drift Q: stray `tools/*`, `repos/{ai-top-utility,fabro,paperclip}` are out of scope (not in the curated list).
- **Phase 2 (grounding) executed:** added 22 peers to `.meta.yaml` + `.gitignore` (commit `1a3eda8`); `meta project list` shows 37 peers. Kicked off `meta git update` to clone them (~3-5 GB).

- **Secrets ‚Üí kasetto.yaml:** STILL UNRESOLVED. `kasetto.yaml` is a Claude-skills installer config, not a secrets store; secrets are GPG-encrypted w/ placeholder `.gpg-id`. Awaiting user clarification on intent. Holding.
- **Next:** verify clones land; then content relocation into the empty repos + hub repos once user creates them. Settle secrets.

changes.title: Refactor FlexNetOS/.github umbrella into meta workspace

commit.message: Ground 22 repos as meta peers; record strategy pivot (ground-first)
